name: GaugeFlow P5-D0.4 fixed-source full-trajectory coordinate-flow learning test v1
purpose: Determine whether the corrected unconditional coordinate field can learn the complete quotient trajectory for the fixed 64 D0.3 sources, without testing source generalization.

parent_evidence.gate_p5_d0_3_translation_quotient_metric: fixed_batch_passed_but_unseen_source_and_free_running_not_passed; D0.4 isolates incomplete temporal coverage by retaining the same 64 source noises

time_sampling.distribution: independent Uniform[0,1] per fixed source per optimizer step

evaluation.teacher_forced_metric: RMS after independently aligning one common fractional translation per graph, then mean-reducing all 64 sources and 33 time points

decision_rule: If every criterion passes, only a separately versioned fixed-endpoint unseen-source generalization test may be proposed. If it fails, inspect time conditioning, vector-field capacity/expression, and trajectory stability. In all cases stop after this test; do not start P5-D1, harmonic, oracle, real tensor, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT work.
